positive: A stunning, symmetrical arrangement of stylized crescent moons, minimalist constellations, and flowing bioluminescent ferns, forming an elegant, repeating pattern. The style is intricate linework etching combined with deep indigo and vibrant turquoise inks on a dark slate background. The composition must be highly centered and balanced, featuring clean, crisp silhouettes suitable for screen printing on apparel. The visual texture should evoke celestial maps and Art Nouveau aesthetics. Cinematic, high contrast, maximal negative space utilization, vector quality.
negative: blurry, grain, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, messy, noisy, out of focus, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cluttered, messy composition, gradient
